tasks.label: H2O: Sync dev-order (TSV master, folder → tsv + views)
H2O: Build → (ON-only aliases) + DevOutput (TSV master)
tasks.command: H2O_BUILD_TS=$(date +%s) && export H2O_BUILD_TS && export H2O_DEV_CLEAN=1 && export H2O_ALIAS_MODE=symlink && export H2O_SRC_DIR="${workspaceFolder}" && export H2O_ORDER_FILE="${workspaceFolder}/config/dev-order.tsv" && export H2O_SERVER_DIR="/Users/hobayda/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/VS Code/h2o-vscode-tm-server" && node "${workspaceFolder}/tools/archive-snapshot.mjs" "${workspaceFolder}" && node "${workspaceFolder}/tools/make-aliases.mjs" && node "${workspaceFolder}/tools/make-dev-loader.mjs" && node "${workspaceFolder}/tools/make-dev-all.mjs" && echo "" && echo "✅ H2O Build Done" && echo "   Server: $H2O_SERVER_DIR" && echo "   Aliases (ON-only): $H2O_SERVER_DIR/alias" && echo "   DevOutput: $H2O_SERVER_DIR/dev_output" && echo "   Selected loader: $H2O_SERVER_DIR/dev_output/_dev-loader.tampermonkey.txt" && echo "   Full loader: $H2O_SERVER_DIR/dev_output/_dev-loader.full.tampermonkey.txt" && echo "   ONE install-all: $H2O_SERVER_DIR/dev_output/one/_install-all.tampermonkey.txt" && echo "   GROUP install-all: $H2O_SERVER_DIR/dev_output/groups/_install-all.tampermonkey.txt" && echo "   BISECT index: $H2O_SERVER_DIR/dev_output/bisect/_index.txt" && echo "   BISECT install-all: $H2O_SERVER_DIR/dev_output/bisect/_install-all.tampermonkey.txt"

tasks.label: H2O: Sync + Build (TSV master) (one click)
tasks.command: H2O_BUILD_TS=$(date +%s) && export H2O_BUILD_TS && export H2O_DEV_CLEAN=1 && export H2O_ALIAS_MODE=symlink && export H2O_SRC_DIR="${workspaceFolder}" && export H2O_ORDER_FILE="${workspaceFolder}/config/dev-order.tsv" && export H2O_SERVER_DIR="/Users/hobayda/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/VS Code/h2o-vscode-tm-server" && node "${workspaceFolder}/tools/sync-dev-order.mjs" && node "${workspaceFolder}/tools/archive-snapshot.mjs" "${workspaceFolder}" && node "${workspaceFolder}/tools/make-aliases.mjs" && node "${workspaceFolder}/tools/make-dev-loader.mjs" && node "${workspaceFolder}/tools/make-dev-all.mjs" && echo "" && echo "✅ H2O Sync + Build Done"
